sourceRef: tip:Knowing when to hand off to the VA directly

slides.headline: Hand off to VA: When to Start
slides.body: Learn when to transition tasks to the VA.

slides.headline: Understand Your Scope
slides.body: Know when your tasks end and the VA's begin.

slides.headline: Identify Critical Decisions
slides.body: When to hand off requires clear, critical decisions.

slides.headline: Review VA Guidance
slides.body: Refer to VA regulations for clarity on when to hand off.

slides.headline: Document Hand-Offs
slides.body: Keep a record of when and why tasks were handed off.

slides.headline: Stay Informed
slides.body: Regularly update on VA policies to maintain knowledge.
Explore more tips for VASCO workflow. Link in bio.
slides.headline: Read the full post

outline.caption: Learn when to hand off tasks to the VA with these five steps. Improve your workflow and ensure critical decisions are made correctly.

rubricBreakdown.critique: The weakest slide is Step 3, 'Review VA Guidance,' as it could benefit from a more concise headline to better match the content.
